nasb.text: who has set signs and wonders in the land of Egypt, and even to this day both in Israel and among mankind; and You have made a name for Yourself, as at this day.

esv.text: You have shown signs and wonders in the land of Egypt, and to this day in Israel and among all mankind, and have made a name for yourself, as at this day.

cnv.text: 你曾在埃及地行神蹟奇事，你在以色列和全人類中間直到今日也是這樣，使你自己得了名聲，好像今日一樣。

ccb.text: 你曾在埃及行神迹奇事，现今仍在以色列和世界各地行神迹奇事，使自己威名远扬，直到今日。
